chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Misc. Appl. No. S- 379 of 2015 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 25.01.2016 1. For orders on office objection 2. For Katcha Peshi Raja Hansraj Naurang, Advocate for Applicant Syed Meeral Shah Bukhkari, D.P.G. This application has been filed for cancellation of bail granted to the accused / respondent vide order dated 24.6.2015 in Crime No. 33 of 2013 under Section 302, 109 and 34 PPC. The role attributed to the respondent is that at his instigation the murder of deceased Mst. Maryam was committed by the co-accused. A perusal of FIR shows that even the respondent is not alleged to be present at the spot. Before the trial court the complainant who is father of deceased had given no objection to the grant of bail and on the basis whereof bail was granted to the respondent. Learned DPG has supported the impugned order. Learned counsel has not been able to controvert the said position. No case for cancelling the bail granted to the respondents is made out, the application is therefore dismissed. JUDGE *Karar/-
